papers.title: AI system learns to keep warehouse robot traffic running smoothly
papers.title_zh: AI system learns to keep warehouse robot traffic running smoothly
papers.tldr_zh: This new approach adapts to decide which robots should get t
papers.cover_zh: This new approach adapts to decide which robots should get t
papers.abstract_zh: This new approach adapts to decide which robots should get the right of way at every moment, avoiding congestion and increasing throughput.
